_comment: v0.3.0 (BREAKING) drops Board contribution + content/kanban-board.md (boards blueprint owns the Board button now). module_directory: 'projects-legacy' is a stopgap satisfying T1.1's required-field check while acknowledging project's content actually materializes at Docs/Meta/* + boards/planning/<slug>/ today (none of project's files reference {{module_directory}}, so the substitution is set-but-unused). Future cycle migrates project to module_directory: 'projects' under beacon/projects/.
name: project
description: Project note bundle — boards/planning/<slug>/ structure, planning board view, workstream manager, /new-project command. v0.3.0 retires the Board button (moved to boards blueprint).

post_install.message: Project blueprint v0.3.0 installed. Board button retired (now provided by boards blueprint). Reload Templater + CustomJS to pick up changes.
